name: claude-ai-tutor-kit
description: Prepare per-section study packets for claude.ai tutored learning sessions. Scoped to Chinese-textbook university courses (scanned PDF textbook + separate aggregated assignment list + chapter/section structure). Three skills: course-exam-distill (one-time exam-paper analysis + per-problem locator index), course-split-section (per-section study-packet assembly, including related past-paper problems), course-init-prompt (drafts Chinese init prompt with direct past-paper references and humanizer-zh pass).
